<!-- Thanks for contributing! Please fill in the checklist below. -->

## What does this PR do?



## Type of change

- [ ] Fix (grammar explanation, drill, phrase, scoring, typo)
- [ ] New content / new skill
- [ ] Docs / README / translations
- [ ] Tooling / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `./scripts/validate-skills.sh` passes locally
- [ ] `SKILL.md` stays under 500 lines (heavy content moved to `references/`)
- [ ] If I changed `README.md`, I updated the `docs/README.<lang>.md` translations (or noted they need re-translation)
- [ ] No copyrighted telc exam material (PDFs/scans/exam text) is included
- [ ] I tested the change live in Claude Code or the Claude app (if applicable)
